_doc: Declarative overlay for the catalogue_outbound generator. Atomic adapter blocs are auto-derived from atlases/meiosis/registries/data/actions.registry.json (one bloc per normalize_<X> action, producing <X>_v1). This file declares: (a) module-metadata overlays for those auto-derived adapter blocs, (b) the 3 CHAIN blocs the manuscript-path workflows need, and (c) the per-candidate track blocs whose builders live outside actions.registry.json today. The generator validates the result against the same three hard constraints atlas-core enforces. Edit this file (not the JSONL outputs) to add new chains.

cross_atlas_inputs._doc: Upstream-dependency declaration. A chain's module can be biomod_status=ready (the COMPUTE code is implemented + tested) yet NOT runnable on the cohort because it consumes products from other atlases that aren't being produced yet. This block makes that distinction machine-readable: `atlases` lists each upstream producer + whether its products are currently available; `by_analysis` maps each analysis_id to the upstream atlases it (transitively) needs. The generator emits upstream_dependencies.jsonl from this and stamps module rows with blocked_on + runnable. Per atlas-core/toolkit_registries/relatedness/01_registry/atlases.jsonl, meiosis_atlas depends_on_atlases: [relatedness_atlas, inversion_atlas].

ngsTracts.note: STEP_TRC_01/02 classifier over ngsPedigree Stage-3 departure intervals; produces the per-interval event classes.

ngsPedigree.note: Stage-3 dyad departure intervals + per-dyad event rates.

relatedness_atlas.note: BLOCKER. Family structure (family_hubs) feeds the family-aware permutation design + the permutation_block partition. A 100x-faster reimplementation of the relatedness pipeline is in progress but untested, so these products are not yet available — every chain needing family structure is blocked here.

inversion_atlas.note: Candidate intervals + per-candidate karyotype assignments. Needed for the per-candidate join, the karyotype stratification, and the local-inversion covariate.

atomic_module_overlay._doc: Keyed by the normalize action's layer_type (e.g. tract_classifications -> chromosome_meiosis_events_builder). Each entry overlays module-registry metadata onto the auto-derived adapter bloc.

tract_classifications.analysis_notes: Adapter pair: import_tract_classifications + normalize_tract_classifications. STEP_TRC_01 output.
tract_classifications.mode_notes: Producer-side ngsTracts; this row registers the adapter that bridges TSV → typed envelope.
tract_classifications.layer_description: Typed envelope (post-normalize) over per-tract event class + indiv + chrom + start_bp + end_bp + flags. STEP_TRC_01 output bridged via adapter.

chromosome_meiosis_events.analysis_notes: Karyotype-stratified rows (homA/het/homB) drive the intrachromosomal-effect view.
chromosome_meiosis_events.mode_notes: Derives co_per_mb / dco_per_mb when absent. Karyotype-stratified rows when karyotype_at_focal_inv present.
chromosome_meiosis_events.layer_description: co_count, dco_count, nco_count + co_per_mb, dco_per_mb per (chrom × dyad). Karyo-stratified rows (homA/het/homB) when karyotype_at_focal_inv present.

coincidence_matrix.analysis_notes: C = r_ab / (r_a · r_b). Derives c when producer omits it; flags c > neg_interference_threshold.
coincidence_matrix.mode_label: coefficient of coincidence per interval pair
coincidence_matrix.mode_notes: c = r_ab/(r_a·r_b); flags c > neg_interference_threshold (default 3.0). Supports karyo-stratified mode for interchromosomal page.
coincidence_matrix.layer_description: c = r_ab / (r_a · r_b). neg_interference_threshold flagging. Both un-stratified (relatedness coincidence page) and karyo-stratified (interchromosomal page) modes.

local_inv_controls.analysis_label: per-(tested chrom × local inversion) covariate matrix
local_inv_controls.analysis_notes: Filtered subset of inversion_candidates.v1; covariate for interchromosomal page.
local_inv_controls.mode_notes: Filtered subset of inversion_candidates.v1; derives length_bp from end-start+1.
local_inv_controls.layer_description: Filtered subset of inversion_candidates.v1 used as covariate context for the interchromosomal page; length_bp derived from end-start+1.

family_aware_permutation_design.mode_notes: permutation_block = family_id by default; n_singleton_blocks diagnostic for shuffle degeneracy.
family_aware_permutation_design.layer_description: Joined from family_hubs.v1 + inversion_karyotypes.v1. Provides permutation_block (family_id by default) for shuffle-within-block null.

per_candidate_tracks.module_stale_reason: per-candidate crossover_track JSON not yet emitted by any pedigree pipeline; layer is CONTRACT-ONLY
per_candidate_tracks.analysis_label: per-candidate sex-specific CO ideogram + telomere curve
per_candidate_tracks.analysis_notes: Per-inversion-candidate JSON; cross-atlas consumer = genome-atlas page3 CO-density sub-track.
per_candidate_tracks.mode_label: per-candidate sex-specific CO ideogram + telomere curve
per_candidate_tracks.mode_notes: Per-inversion-candidate JSON; consumer also includes genome-atlas page3 CO-density sub-track.
per_candidate_tracks.layer_description: Per-inversion-candidate JSON: candidate_span, events[chrom,pos,sex,indiv,in_span], telomere_curve. Consumer also includes genome-atlas page3 CO-density sub-track (cross-atlas read).

per_candidate_tracks.module_stale_reason: per-candidate nco_gc_track JSON not yet emitted by any pedigree pipeline; layer is CONTRACT-ONLY
per_candidate_tracks.analysis_label: per-candidate NCO/GC tract ideogram + telomere curve
per_candidate_tracks.analysis_notes: Sister track to crossover_track; ngsTracts STEP_TRC_01 output keyed per candidate.
per_candidate_tracks.mode_label: per-candidate NCO/GC tract ideogram + telomere curve
per_candidate_tracks.mode_notes: Sister track to crossover_track; kind ∈ {nco, gc}.
per_candidate_tracks.layer_description: Per-inversion-candidate JSON: candidate_span, tracts[chrom,start_bp,end_bp,kind∈nco|gc,indiv,in_span], telomere_curve. Sister to crossover_track.

per_candidate_tracks.module_stale_reason: MEME/STREME wrapper on CO ±2kb hotspots; optional layer, page hides logo card when pwm null
per_candidate_tracks.analysis_notes: Optional. MEME / STREME wrapper. Page hides logo card when pwm null.
per_candidate_tracks.mode_notes: Optional. Embedded on same per-candidate crossover JSON.
per_candidate_tracks.layer_description: { pwm: N×4 ACGT PWM | null, tool, evalue, n_hotspots }. Embedded on same per-candidate crossover JSON. Optional — page hides logo card when pwm null.

chains.analysis_label: NCO enrichment inside vs outside inversion (cohort, MOSAIC_SHORT × inside-inv)
chains.analysis_notes: CHAIN — PROMOTED: tract_classifications_v1 → crosstab → Fisher exact (two-sided + one-sided-greater). Runner: runners.compute_nco_enrichment.compute. v1 is cohort-level; per-candidate fan-out is v2.
chains.mode_label: NCO enrichment inside vs outside inversion (Fisher exact)
chains.mode_notes: CHAIN. Dispatch via POST /api/actions {type: 'compute_nco_inside_vs_outside_inversion', target: {source_layer_id: '<tract_classifications_v1>'}, params: {target_class: 'MOSAIC_SHORT'}}. Manuscript NCO headline.
chains.layer_description: CHAIN OUTPUT (cohort v1). { target_class, n_inside_target, n_outside_target, n_inside_other_nco_like, n_outside_other_nco_like, odds_ratio, log_odds, p_fisher_two_sided, p_fisher_one_sided_greater } + summary. Manuscript NCO headline (MOSAIC_SHORT × inside-inv).

chains.analysis_label: CO_rate(het) vs CO_rate(non-het) per chromosome (Welch's t)
chains.analysis_notes: CHAIN — PROMOTED: chromosome_meiosis_events_v1 (karyo-stratified) → per-dyad CO_per_mb split by het vs non-het → Welch's t per chrom (hand-rolled t-CDF via incomplete beta) + rate_ratio < flag_threshold flag. Runner: runners.compute_intrachromosomal_co.compute.
chains.mode_label: CO_rate(het) vs CO_rate(non-het) per chromosome (Welch's t)
chains.mode_notes: CHAIN. Dispatch via POST /api/actions {type: 'compute_intrachromosomal_co_karyotype_effect', target: {source_layer_id: '<chromosome_meiosis_events_v1>'}, params: {flag_threshold: 0.7}}. Source envelope rows must carry karyotype_at_focal_inv. Manuscript intrachromosomal-suppression signal.
chains.layer_description: CHAIN OUTPUT (per-chrom v1). Per chromosome: { n_dyads_het, n_dyads_non_het, mean_co_per_mb_het, mean_co_per_mb_non_het, rate_ratio_het_over_non_het, welch_t, welch_df, p_two_sided, flag_below_threshold }. Manuscript intrachromosomal-suppression signal.

chains.analysis_label: HEADLINE: focal inversion karyotype → meiosis on OTHER chromosomes
chains.analysis_notes: CHAIN — PROMOTED: chromosome_meiosis_events_v1 + family_aware_permutation_design_v1 (+ optional local_inv_controls_v1) → per-parent CO_per_mb split by karyotype → Welch's t + family-aware permutation null (shuffle karyotype labels within permutation_block via mulberry32 PRNG when seeded) + BH + Bonferroni across off-focal chrom tests. Runner: runners.compute_interchromosomal_effect.compute.
chains.mode_label: HEADLINE: focal inversion karyotype → meiosis on OTHER chromosomes
chains.mode_notes: CHAIN. Dispatch via POST /api/actions {type: 'compute_interchromosomal_inversion_effect', target: {events_layer_id, controls_layer_id, design_layer_id}, params: {focal_inversion_id, n_permutations, seed, p_bh_alpha}}. Manuscript HEADLINE. controls envelope is optional but drives focal-chrom detection + local_inv_burden flag.
chains.layer_description: CHAIN OUTPUT (HEADLINE v1). Per (focal_inversion × tested_chrom): { is_focal_chrom, n_het, n_nonhet, mean_diff, t_stat, p_value (permutation), p_bh, p_bonf, sig_flag, local_inv_burden }. Focal-chrom row included but excluded from BH alpha control.

chains.analysis_label: Per-candidate NCO enrichment (Fisher per inversion + BH across the set)
chains.analysis_notes: CHAIN — v2 fan-out of nco_inside_vs_outside_inversion. tract_classifications_v1 + inversion_candidates.v1 → per-candidate crosstab → Fisher exact → BH/Bonferroni across the candidate set. Cross-atlas read from inversion-atlas (inversion_candidates.v1). Runner: runners.compute_nco_per_candidate.compute.
chains.mode_label: Per-candidate NCO enrichment (Fisher per inversion + BH)
chains.mode_notes: CHAIN. Dispatch via POST /api/actions {type: 'compute_nco_per_candidate_enrichment', target: {tracts_layer_id, candidates_layer_id}, params: {target_class, p_bh_alpha}}. Manuscript per-inversion p-value table.
chains.layer_description: CHAIN OUTPUT (v2 per-candidate). One row per inversion candidate with cells + odds ratio + p_fisher + p_bh + p_bonf + sig_flag. Candidates missing chrom/start_bp/end_bp emit skipped=true with null stats.
